authority: This manifest and FROSTGATE_CANONICAL_ROADMAP.md supersede all prior phase descriptions. This is the definitive implementation roadmap combining all three audit sources.
execution_state_purpose: Machine-readable current position in the roadmap. Single source of truth for agents, CI, dashboards, and autonomous planners. Update on every PR merge and gate transition.

roadmap_sections.mission_statement: FrostGate Mission — 4 immutable properties; no PR may reduce any
roadmap_sections.section_3: Current Platform State — complete, partial, and missing capabilities
roadmap_sections.section_6: Gap Analysis — 14 gaps with effort and risk
roadmap_sections.section_7: Deterministic PR Roadmap — two-lane architecture, 8-KPI map, 62 PRs across 10 steps
roadmap_sections.revenue_gate_1: Revenue Gate 1 — 12-item checklist before Phase 1+; exit condition: one paying client
roadmap_sections.revenue_gate_2: Revenue Gate 2 — first MRR signed before Platform Expansion
roadmap_sections.section_8: Expansion Backlog — deferred capabilities with triggering conditions
roadmap_sections.section_9: Timeline to First Paying Customer — critical path, 3-4 week estimate
roadmap_sections.section_10: Timeline to Sustainable MRR — 4-6 month estimate
roadmap_sections.section_11: Timeline to Platform Leadership — 24-36 month estimate
roadmap_sections.section_12: Risks to Revenue — 9 risks with mitigations
roadmap_sections.section_14: Risks to Long-Term Vision — 7 strategic risks
roadmap_sections.section_15: Final Recommended Execution Order — two-lane table with KPI column; Lane 1 before first invoice, Lane 1 before first MRR, Lane 2 expansion phases
roadmap_sections.section_16: Customer Journey Map — 16 stages from cold lead to expansion, each with customer/Jason/software/revenue answers
roadmap_sections.section_17: Anti-Drift Constitution — 10 permitted categories, explicit deferred list, 3-question adjudication, one override case
roadmap_sections.section_18: Product Operating Metrics — north star (MRR), 16 leading indicators, metric-to-PR mapping, instrumentation minimum

pre_verified_facts.finding: _PLACEHOLDER_COVERAGE: float = 0.5 — all five quality inputs (evidence_coverage, verification_coverage, freshness, confidence, completeness) assigned from this constant. Comment reads 'Real integration with evidence, verification, and remediation services happens later.'

audit_disagreements_resolved.repository_evidence: apps/portal/app/remediation/page.tsx — 635 lines, real code, getRemediationRoadmap() wired to api/field_assessment.py:9629
audit_disagreements_resolved.resolution: WIRED — Claude audit was wrong. Repository evidence is authoritative.

audit_disagreements_resolved.repository_evidence: apps/portal/lib/portalApi.ts:446 confirmed wired to real endpoint

audit_disagreements_resolved.claude_audit: AI assistant gate is first break (Step 16 of journey)
audit_disagreements_resolved.codex_audit: Report quality placeholder is upstream first break
audit_disagreements_resolved.resolution: Report quality placeholder (engine.py:96) is the first break — it affects the delivered artifact before the portal is even opened. AI gate is second break. Codex had the correct sequence.

audit_disagreements_resolved.codex_audit: Uniquely identified — api/remediation_authority.py (canonical, 24 routes) vs api/remediation.py (legacy, still active)
audit_disagreements_resolved.resolution: Confirmed. Two active remediation subsystems with no formal canonical declaration. Codex unique finding incorporated as R-1 in canonical roadmap.

audit_disagreements_resolved.codex_audit: Flagged dirty working tree with uncommitted actor-attribution files
audit_disagreements_resolved.resolution: Codex concern was valid at time of audit. Resolved by subsequent merges — PRs #536 and #537 merged the in-progress work. Branch is now clean at audited commit.
audit_disagreements_resolved.winner: Codex (raised correct concern; pre-spawn confirms resolved)

audit_disagreements_resolved.resolution: api/identity_authority/providers/entra_provider.py confirmed fully implemented. PR #537 merged. Not a stub.
audit_disagreements_resolved.winner: Repository evidence (both audits stale at merge time)

phase_0_prs.title: Assert critical production keys at startup
Declare remediation authority canonical; mark api/remediation.py non-canonical
Wire report quality to real evidence sources
Validate all portal pages with live engagement data
Bind provisioning completion to portal activation deterministically
Auto-enable AI assistant on QA approval (remove manual gate)
Validate portal remediation routing with live data

phase_0_entry_criteria: Branch clean (PRs #536, #537 merged). Production live. ROADMAP.md Phase 0 infrastructure tasks 1.1-18.6 complete.
phase_0_exit_criteria: TC-7 merged (report quality placeholder fixed). R-1 merged (remediation canonical declared). P-1 merged (provisioning bind deterministic). H1-H18 dry run completed. First client identified.
proceed_verdict: PROCEED — first client can be booked today with manual workarounds. TC-7 must ship before first invoice is issued.
first_client_conditions: TC-7: Report quality placeholder must be replaced before first invoice
TC-0: Startup key assertions must be added
H1-H18 dry run must be completed
Anthropic API credit balance must be verified (last confirmed $3.50 on 2026-05-31 — may be depleted)
Railway Hobby plan headroom (CLIENT_READINESS A10 unchecked) must be verified
stop_doing: New work in services/governance_orchestration/ (21 files — Phase 5, requires client scale)
New work in services/governance_simulation/ (14 files — Phase 5)
New work in services/governance_digital_twin/ (Phase 6, requires 10+ clients)
New work in services/governance_optimization/ (requires data at scale)
New work in services/governance_adaptive_intelligence/ (requires cross-tenant data set)
Extending services/ai_plane_extension/ before live call path is confirmed end-to-end
New CI test lanes before team exceeds 3 engineers
FedRAMP planning before govcon client signs letter of intent
PCI DSS playbook before PCI client identified
Trust-chain depth beyond TC-7 before first invoice
Report Authority complexity beyond placeholder fix
critical_unknowns: Production AI call path — which of services/ai/* or services/ai_plane_extension/ handles live production chat (dead-symbol census flagged 403 symbols)
Whether remediation-roadmap endpoint returns populated data for real engagements (not tested with live data)
Whether reportlab is installed in Railway production environment
Whether MINISIGN_SECRET_KEY is set in Railway production
Whether FG_BILLING_EVIDENCE_HMAC_KEY is set in Railway production
Whether Anthropic API credit balance is still sufficient as of 2026-07-13 (last confirmed $3.50 on 2026-05-31)
Whether portal AI assistant returns grounded evidence-based answers or generic Anthropic responses
Which report system (field_assessment or report_authority) the portal reads from for report delivery

revenue_targets.phase_7_arr: Enterprise moat tier $8,000-$20,000/month with compounding data advantage

assumptions: Audited commit f70cccc29c6d28c3c012f8dcdc96dbe0bf8bd25e is the baseline; all file-level findings are relative to this commit
PRs #536 and #537 are merged and branch is clean — confirmed via git log
ROADMAP.md Phase 0 infrastructure tasks 1.1-18.6 are complete per living roadmap
Railway Hobby plan is current deployment environment
Auth0 OIDC is the console auth provider; HMAC-SHA256 portal sessions for client auth
Anthropic API is the LLM provider for AI workspace
limitations: Dead-symbol census identified 403 symbols across multiple modules that could not be verified as live — production call paths for AI dispatch are unconfirmed
Trust chain architecture was built top-down (logic layer 1.6A-1.8A before persistence 1.1-1.6) — TC-1 through TC-6 are required to complete the durability layer
Continuous monitoring connector runtime is fully stubbed — cannot pitch automated continuous monitoring before PR-8/CM-1 ships
No live engagement data validation was performed — portal pages confirmed wired but not tested with real client data
Anthropic credit balance was $3.50 on 2026-05-31 — current balance unknown

manifest_changelog.changes: Added mission statement, two-lane architecture, Revenue Gates 1-2, KPI map, Section 16 (Customer Journey Map), Section 17 (Anti-Drift Constitution), Section 18 (Product Operating Metrics)

mission_properties: Every interaction increases customer switching cost
Every client increases the intelligence of the platform

gate_1.exit_condition: One paying client — invoice issued, paid, portal accessed, remediation roadmap opened

gate_2.exit_condition: First MRR contract signed, Stripe subscription active
